title: 2. Extraordinary connections of the spleen and small intestine: Shenguan (77.18)
text:
channel, and SI3, a point on the small intestine, form the very effective combination for treating the
frozen shoulder.  Shenguan and Wanshuanyi (22.08) and Wanshuaner (22.09) form a good combination
to expel dampness and effectively treat lumbago.  Those are the examples of the extraordinary
connections of the spleen and small intestine.
